title: Skillbound
description:
Master over 150 handcrafted challenges, unlock 48 powerful upgrades, and conquer four unique zones in this fast-paced precision platformer.Race through an ever-evolving 2D precision platformer where quick reflexes and smart decisions determine how far you'll go. Leap across deadly obstacles, dodge increasingly dangerous projectile patterns, and survive as every zone introduces new mechanics, enemies, and challenges.

Earn experience with every run to level up and choose from 48+ powerful upgrades that transform your playstyle. Discover new abilities, create unique builds, and push your limits in an endless test of skill and progression.

Precision PlatformingMaster tight jumps, perfect timing, and split-second reactions through increasingly difficult obstacle courses.

150+ Handcrafted ChallengesTake on over 150 carefully designed challenges, each featuring unique combinations of obstacles, projectile patterns, and platforming sequences that continuously test your skill.

48+ Powerful UpgradesLevel up during your runs and choose from over 48 upgrades that change the way you play. Build powerful combinations, improve your abilities, and adapt your strategy to survive longer.

Four Unique ZonesProgress through four distinct zones, each introducing new environments, visual styles, hazards, projectile types, and increasing difficulty.
description_short: Build wildly overpowered upgrade combinations while surviving handcrafted precision platforming challenges.
